programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm
programme.desc: It's week 11 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and bad luck, bait problems and big egos plague the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: An elderly woman is driving when she’s overcome with shooting pains and crashes her car. She’s rushed to the hospital, but the doctors find nothing wrong. Can Dr. G find the cause of death?

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker
programme.desc: Posing as a member of the Rothschild banking dynasty, he duped a string of women in the UK and US.
programme.sub-title: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Gene Morrison – Fraudulent Forensics Expert
programme.desc: He faked his own credentials and netted $400,000 of taxpayers money, giving bogus court testimony and investigative services.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: The Conman Kid – Aged Just 13
programme.desc: This 13-year-old pulled off almost half a million dollars worth of fraud, often selling goods that didn’t exist.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Who Killed Santa?
programme.desc: In 2001, there are a series of murders of homeless people in Toronto. The latest killing is of a gentle man, well known in the area by residents who nicknamed him Santa Claus.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit
programme.desc: A string of bank robberies in Winnipeg confound local police. Most bank-robbers are addicts, usually quite thin. This new man doesn't fit the profile: this bandit is fat.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Pointing to Murder
programme.desc: A withered corpse is found half-buried in a field beside a theme park. Too decayed to identify properly, detectives have only the leathery fingers of one hand to work from.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: An Unlikely Suspect
programme.desc: The community of Dover, Delaware is shocked when human body parts turn up throughout the city. Authorities determine that the remains are all from the same victim, but it will take the best forensic scientists in the country to make a positive ID..

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Deadly Medicine
programme.desc: When the death rate at a rural Indiana hospital skyrockets, an investigation implicates a nurse, Orville Lynn Majors. State Police are left with a daunting task.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Roy Radin was a successful New York theatrical producer with a knack for making money and a taste for the high life. His hopes for making it as a Hollywood producer ended abruptly in a remote canyon outside of Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Robert Peernock was an expert in pyrotechnics who knew how to blow things up. But when he tried to kill his wife and daughter by rigging their car to explode, something backfired, and his daughter survived.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Infant Mortality
programme.desc: On the morning of January 23, 1994, a slumber party in Alvin, Texas becomes the scene of a terrible tragedy when 2 ½-year-old Renee Goode is discovered dead.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Green Widow
programme.desc: The Green Widow focuses on Mary Ellen Samuels, a woman whose lust for money and drugs led her to arrange for the 1988 murder of her husband, a successful Hollywood cameraman.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When 27-year-old David Wahl disappears without a trace from a state park in Oregon, he leaves behind a distraught family and a host of unanswered questions. Months later and 100 miles north, Wahl’s body washes ashore.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Father's Pain
programme.desc: When a mother and her infant daughter disappear from rural Huntsville, Texas, suspicion quickly falls on the woman’s husband. Lacking evidence, authorities cannot make an arrest.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Deadly Fixation
programme.desc: On Memorial Day Weekend 1996, a woman’s body is discovered in a storm drain in Marietta, Ohio. Police eventually identify the woman as college student Sheree Petry and begin to focus the investigation on one suspect.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Fast Food Killer
programme.desc: For many teenagers, their first jobs are at fast-food restaurants. Parents feel that these are safe environments for their children.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Sean Combs
programme.desc: Exploring who killed Melvin Combs and how the event of losing his dad propelled young Sean forward.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lethal Injector
programme.desc: In 1996, nurses and patients at the Veteran's Affairs Medical Center in Northampton are concerned. It seems that wherever nurse Kristen Gilbert goes, death follows.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Yosemite Park Murderer
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day weekend 1999, three tourists from Yosemite National Park disappeared and were found murdered a month later.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Wayne Clifford Boden: The Vampire Rapist

programme.sub-title: Wayne Clifford Boden: The Vampire Rapist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Victoria Day Shooter
programme.desc: On a single rain-soaked night during the Victoria Day weekend, police are called to the scene of three very similar crimes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Kid with the Hollywood Haircut
programme.desc: After confessing to the brutal murder of Clarence Pellet in Shelby, Montana, Frank Dryman, a mysterious hitchhiker, is sentenced to hang.
programme.sub-title: The Kid with the Hollywood Haircut

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Teenage Terrors
programme.desc: Six days into 2004, an unidentified man is found stabbed to death just outside of the booming oil city of Calgary, Alberta. Just when the police appear to have no leads, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: Crime Stories: A Way with Murder
programme.desc: Nancy, David and Susan Spangler are found shot to death in their home - the brutal slaughter is deemed a murder suicide.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Long Stemmed Killer
programme.desc: Just hours before her divorce hearing, Atlanta socialite Lita McClinton opens her front door for a flower delivery. The deliveryman hands her a box of roses and then shoots her dead.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slaying Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Erika DeNardo‚Äôs mother and brother were murdered, she told police and neighbours it had been the work of thieves.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Missing Mom
programme.desc: Stephen Grant reported his wife, Tara Lynn Grant, missing five days after he said she left their house in an unidentified black car.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terry Driver: The Abbotsford Killer

programme.desc: In 1989, the entire town of Miramichi is held hostage by a monster. A troubled man with a heinous past embarks on a 7-month crime spree, including brutal beatings, rape, arson and serial murder.

programme.desc: A man who was once accepted into a small Quebec community turns out to be a murderer, whose crimes cover nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Scorpion: Love Boat
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets.

programme.title: Scorpion: Going South
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Mexico when a tech billionaire hires them to rescue his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Scorpion: Once Bitten, Twice Die
programme.desc: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

programme.title: Scorpion: Young Hearts Spark Fire
programme.desc: While on a mission to save lost hikers, Team Scorpion's helicopter crashes, igniting a massive wildfire that quickly closes in on them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet

programme.title: Scorpion: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe, and Happy are trapped with the crew in a top-secret submarine when an explosion sends it to the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Super Fun Guys

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hidden

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Landmine
programme.desc: Landmine tries to adjust to life on Earth while recovering from the injury Starscream's null cannons inflicted on him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Space
programme.desc: Bud is taken into space so he can see what the Earth is really like, but trouble occurs when he and Scattershot must be saved while the others are fighting against Thundercracker and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Rush

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Speed
programme.desc: Starscream plots how he can defend his title as Megatron's right-hand man while Thundercracker lures the Autobots into a trap. Meanwhile, Hot Shot tries another attempt to beat Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Collapse
programme.desc: Megatron searches for the Cyber Planet Key with extreme force, while the Autobots try to stop the massive earthquakes that are threatening the city.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Time

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Search
programme.desc: The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Deep

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trap
programme.desc: The secret history of Earth and Cybertron is revealed with the awakening of monster-hunting Autobot Smokescreen/Crosswise. Meanwhile the Autobots are drawn into a cavern filled with ancient Decepticons...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion
programme.desc: Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat
programme.desc: The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation
programme.desc: Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Critical
programme.desc: Just as all hope is lost, the light of Primus shines down on the fallen Autobot warriors (Scattershot, Red Alert, and Hot Shot) and resurrects them.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Assault
programme.desc: A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Starscream
programme.desc: With the Autobots closing in, Starscream unleashes the Omega Lock's power and grows to a tremendous size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: United
programme.desc: Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Cybertron
programme.desc: The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Balance
programme.desc: The true form of planet Cybertron is revealed as the planet sized transformer, Primus. Jolt is used as the device to connect and relay the messages of Primus, who begins to speak of things that have long since passed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Darkness
programme.desc: The Autobots search for Jolt and the kids who have been kidnapped by Sideways and Starscream, but Megatron has discovered new information regarding Unicron's dark power that could alter the effects of the war.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Memory
programme.desc: The kids are forced to use trickery to keep Sideways and Starscream from deleting Jolt's memory, but the Autobots are getting closer with every minute.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Escape
programme.desc: Jolt and the kids manage to get off a distress call, but Megatron refuses to let Optimus out of battle forcing Vector Prime to lead the rescue team with one big question: will they arrive on time?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Family
programme.desc: In order to rescue his brother, Coby decides to go to Giant Planet. But before he leaves, he tries to tell his parents about the Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Titans
programme.desc: Primus tries to use his spark energy to stop the black hole but Starscream interferes by throwing himself into Primus's spark energy, this causes him to grow to planet size. He then decides to take on Primus.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Warp
programme.desc: The Autobots travel to the Giant Planet on the old Atlantian ship Ogygia, but in the space bridge they must face off with the very mind of Atlantis itself.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Giant
programme.desc: The Autobots must convince giant Transformers who are only interested in building new buildings to assist them in their search for the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fury
programme.desc: The Autobots begin the search for the missing Cyber Planet Key, but there about to have bigger problems on hand as Megatron is resurrected into the mighty Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: City
programme.desc: Optimus and company rescue Bud and the Minicons, but Ransack and Crumplezone will do everything possible to prevent them from finding the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ambush
programme.desc: The Autobots divide into teams and journeys to the depths of Giant Planet. However, they face a difficult battle against an attack from a strange underground structure and Decepticon.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Summer
programme.desc: This one-hour special chronicles Les's first time surviving for the cameras in August of 2001. With just two cameras, a few items and his wits, Les survives in the Canadian wild.

programme.title: Survivorman: Amazon
programme.desc: After brushing up on wilderness and hunting tactics from the skilled Waorani tribe, Les will have to survive on next to nothing while capturing it all with the camera equipment he lugs around.

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Les recreates the real life story of family who were lost and stranded for six days in the forests of Oregon.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on purpose, accompanied by his long-time survival buddy Bob Wilson, on a deserted island in the Kingdom of Tonga.

programme.title: Survivorman: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: Les will be set adrift in an inflatable life raft off the coast of Belize. Not only does the life raft have a few bad water leaks, but it also leaks air, requiring Les to frequently re-inflate it.

programme.title: Survivorman: Smoky Mountain Sasquatch
programme.desc: Les goes deep into the heart of Tennessee's Great Smoky Mountains in pursuit of Bigfoot. Encounters with an unknown creature have been reported in this black bear hotspot, and Les knows that where bears thrive, Sasquatch can thrive, too.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Wabakimi
programme.desc: Les and Logan set out for a fishing trip in a tin boat. Stranded after their motor dies, Les and Logan are quickly plunged into an intense survival situation that could happen to any summer cottager.

programme.title: Survivorman: Giants of the Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the wilderness of remote Alberta to investigate evidence of Sasquatch activity. Armed with infrared camera and thermal imaging technology, Les investigates reports of Bigfoot sightings in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Portland Oregon
programme.desc: Les goes to a secret location just outside of Portland, Oregon with his friend and filmmaker Devon Massyn in search of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Survivorman: Top Ten
programme.desc: Les reviews his experiences surviving in the wild. While counting down ten wilderness survival issues he has faced, he shows segments of both shows relevant to each item.

programme.title: Survivorman: Mystery of Bigfoot Mountain
programme.desc: Les ventures into the most remote and dangerous grizzly bear territory of the Canadian Rockies in his search for Sasquatch. In this vast and unexplored forest, anything could be out there. Can Les capture definitive proof of Bigfoot?

programme.title: Survivorman: Colorado Rockies
programme.desc: Out for a casual day's ride, Les (and horses) have to survive temperatures that vary from 70°F in the day to snow flurries at night.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les pits his jungle survival skills against the incredibly diverse mountain jungle terrain of Grenada's largest active mountain, Mt. St. Catherine.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Boreal Forest
programme.desc: The Boreal Forest is home to 85 species of mammals including; moose, deer, bear and wolves. Crisscrossed by rivers and lakes, the Boreal forest is frost-free for only about three months of the year.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survival Challenge
programme.desc: Les takes a group of NHL hockey players out to the wilderness to see if they have what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Survivorman: Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Through the perilous jungle Survivorman treks deep, with the help of a couple of local guides. Led off the beaten path he is deserted alone in this primordial landscape.

programme.title: Survivorman: African Plains
programme.desc: Survivorman Les Stroud arrives in South Africa via hot air balloon, and must immediately contend with potential danger from lions, hippos, water buffalo and the deadly black mamba.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Ecuador
programme.desc: Father and son embark on a photography expedition deep in the Ecuadorian jungle but when the tour guide doesn't return, Les and Logan must put their wills of survival to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Survivorman: Texas/Utah
programme.desc: Les tracks Sasquatch from East Texas to rural Utah in an effort to elicit an encounter.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a wealthy couple are attacked outside their home, the man was killed and his wife was forced to open their hidden safe. Who knew of the safe is the key to solving the crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man was blasted to oblivion with a homemade bomb. Amongst the rubble, investigators unearthed tiny evidence that led straight to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a 12-year-old girl claims to have been abducted and assaulted, police find her account hard to believe. Forensic evidence backs up her story.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives employ the latest sonic technology to solve the baffling case of a union official who was executed in his home shortly after a strike.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. Four years later, new forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called 'hero.'

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man accused of shooting his estranged wife insists she killed herself, investigators must decide if the victim's death was suicide or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Fire fighters find an entire family dead inside their burned-out home, and at first glance, it appears to be a case of murder-suicide. But clues found at the scene soon lead investigators to believe otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The homicide of a gay couple leads investigators into the twisted world of White supremacists. Can paint chips and an analysis of glass shards help catch the murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police discover a man shot dead in his home after they receive a call from his worried mother. Can clues from a rare gun and the victim's beloved dog help solve the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A TV news producer is murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of wrongdoing. Can a DNA data bank help catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to a shooting and discover the dead victim's husband is one of their own. Did the policeman's wife accidentally shoot herself in the head?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of her prescribed drugs. Did she die of natural causes or was it a case of murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine near a jogging path. Crucial crime scene evidence had been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Can detectives catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl's body is discovered ten days after she disappears, police mount a search for a killer. Can evidence at the crime scene help catch a suspect?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Can police nail the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Follow the six year story of a killer who prowled New York. He wrote letters to the police declaring he would kill 12 people, one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep, toxicology tests reveal that it may have been foul play. Could a `suicide note' hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Could a diary, found years after the murder, help solve this tragic case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is discovered murdered in his bed, his wife claims it's suicide. Could a tape from a bank surveillance camera prove otherwise?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, police believe it's no accident. Can a pinprick of blood help to convict a killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Will a discarded sweet wrapper and a few tiny seeds be enough to help forensic scientists discover the identity of a callous murderer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car, police suspect he may have been murdered. Can a renowned forensic anthropologist uncover the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, killing a young man and seriously injuring his mother, detectives hope that the remnants of a mailing label will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A quiet residential community, shattered by the murder of a neighbour. See how modern techniques helped investigators catch the culprit in less than 12 hours.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Bruce Miller was shot to death in his office. The crime scene was clean of fingerprints and hairs, with no trace fibres. Could computer forensics help catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man is murdered in a drive-by shooting. When a mobile phone trace incriminates a killer, it's up to a forensic geologist to find evidence that he was at the scene.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead, her boyfriend confesses to her murder. However, in a strange twist, so does another man. Who was telling the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a high school gym teacher went missing, investigators suspected foul play. With no body, could the case be cracked with the help of forensic science?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old girl was killed by her mother and father, in her own home. Her parents said they acted in self-defence, but the forensic evidence indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mysterious computer bug pushes a thriving company to the brink of collapse. Can forensic investigators determine if the crash was the result of sabotage?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: During a routine motorcade for the Queen's US visit, two security cars collide and agents are killed. Investigators reach different conclusions as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, an Amtrak train crashed, crossing Alabama's Bayou Canot bridge. Forty-seven passengers and crew were killed. Investigators hunt for clues as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fire erupted at King's Cross Underground, investigators were able to pinpoint the cause. Could they explain why it became a blazing inferno, killing 31 people?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A discarded sleeping bag, containing bloody sneakers and a purse, leads police to the body of a young woman. The autopsy and crime scene were analysed, but it would be a mark found on the victim's body that would enable police to track the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. She has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, so police assume it was a hunting accident until a strange letter turns up, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The discovery of vital evidence, more than 2,000 miles away from a murder victim's body, helps detectives piece together the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Elevation
programme.desc: An international team of the best construction engineers on the planet are building the world's tallest skyscraper in the United Arab Emirate city of Dubai.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Artic Ice Crusher
programme.desc: In South Korea, a team of shipbuilders has only ten weeks to assemble the hull of the first combination oil tanker-icebreaker they've ever built.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Big Rig
programme.desc: The Aker H6e is the biggest oil rig on the planet – built for the extreme conditions of the Barents Sea. Marine operations chief Knut Engebretsen and his team have tight deadlines for some major moves to put this monster together.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sheikh Zayed Bridge
programme.desc: Building the Sheikh Zayed Bridge, the stunning grand gateway to the world's richest city, Abu Dhabi, capital of the United Arab Emirates, is a king size headache for Mark Jones, the engineer assembling its giant signature arches.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: For centuries there have been countless and huge advances in the field of civil engineering. Thanks to the explanations of leading experts in physics, maths and other hard sciences. In this film we look at the masters of rail.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: To fly... A dream that has shaped the history of humanity. A story of crazy flyers - inventors, scientists - pursuing their dream, often risking their lives doing so. Matthieu Barreau went in search of these intrepid pioneers.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: 70% of the earth's surface is covered by water and much of the history of man's discovery of the earth is linked to oceans. From the fragile boats which sailed along the Mediterranean coasts to the majestic ships which sailed off to the New World.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: How are gravity defying bridges designed? For centuries there have been countless and huge advances in the field of civil engineering. Thanks to the explanations of leading, the viewer plunges into a world of inventions.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: Which was the invention that propelled the construction of higher and higher buildings? Concrete? Iron? It's the elevator. From the Tower of Babel to the Kingdom Tower in Saudi Arabia, humankind has always searched to build bigger and higher.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Roller Coaster
programme.desc: At Six Flags Magic Mountain the worlds longest, fastest and tallest Flying Roller Coaster is under construction. If the Park can't get the ride up and ready for the Spring break crowds 2007 this 21 million dollar investment won't be worth a penny.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Madrid's Big Dig
programme.desc: Under a sweltering sun in the heart of Madrid, Spanish construction workers are working non-stop on the job of a lifetime, the M-30 Madrid project. At a cost of 3.7 billion Euros it is the largest urban tunneling system ever undertaken.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Venice: Code Red
programme.desc: It’s the ultimate engineering challenge: rescue the magnificent city of Venice, Italy, before it is drowned by the Adriatic Sea. A fantastic 5.5 billion dollar plan is taking shape. It’s called the “Mose project”, after the biblical saviour Moses.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Race to the Games
programme.desc: The countdown is on at London’s Olympic Park. With the games just one year away crews have started laying 850,000 four-inch square tiles across the deck of the massive Aquatics Centre.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Blockbuster Bridge
programme.desc: In South Korea engineers are fighting against the forces of the wild West Sea to build the Incheon Grand Bridge. It’s part of a visionary plan to link the biggest airport in the nation, with a new international investment zone called New Songdo.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: Deep under the Swiss alps there is a light at the end of the world’s longest tunnel. This April, after twelve long years it will be completely cut end to end.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Big Bosphorus Dig
programme.desc: Weary commuters in Istanbul, Turkey must tough it out after the Marmaray Project is delayed four years by the discovery of the city's fourth century port with thirty-four ancient shipwrecks.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Power Generator
programme.desc: A three hundred and ninety ton giant on a daring journey: A team of German heavy-lift-specialists have to transport a generator from a disused coal plant to its new operation site 120 kilometers away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Mining Truck
programme.desc: If a transporter needs to be transported, if 176 wheels aren't enough to carry its weight and if the load weighs twice as much as the transporter... Then it must be the mother of all mega transports!

programme.title: Cops Uncut UK: Episode 13
programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Wardens: Warden's Instinct
programme.desc: There is often a fine line between false information and the truth. Veteran Region 5 wardens use their sixth to bring game violators to justice.

programme.title: Wardens: Fourth Dimension
programme.desc: Fourth of July in Montana – Flathead Lake is where the party is at. But with the heat tempers flare and the free flowing alcohol combines to make a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Wardens: Behind The Shed
programme.desc: When the game ranges are opened up for Antler Shed Hunting its all hands on deck for the Montana Game Wardens. Reports of Bears, Mountain Lions and lost hunters keep the wardens busy.

programme.title: Wardens: Fun in The Sun
programme.desc: When Jet skies get too close to boats things can turn dangerous. And Warden Bryan Golie questions an angler in search for the truth.

programme.title: Wardens: Above & Beyond
programme.desc: Wardens often go the extra mile to investigate a report of illegal activity, help a hunter or protect landowner rights. This week Wardens go that extra mile with an unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Wardens: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: In 2012 The small community of Whitefish Montana was shocked by the useless killing of over 20 deer. Region 1 Wardens think outside the box to put a stop to this heinous crime.

programme.title: Wardens: Invasive Species
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Wardens: Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Wardens: Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk being poached and illegally tagged deer. But the Future of hunting is bright with a new batch of hunters.

programme.title: Wardens: Night Chase
programme.desc: With a massive Winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: Wardens: Wasted Dummy
programme.desc: This week Warden Lesofski searches out a hunting party that left their elk to rot. While Region 2 Wardens rush into a volatile situation after their decoy is shot from the road.

programme.title: Wardens: Minor Mistakes
programme.desc: A riverside check station catches four minors with no life jackets and a lot of alcohol. Then Warden Golie stops two car full of minors that should not be behind the wheel.

programme.title: Wardens: True Lies
programme.desc: A check station outside of Billings stops a guy who refuses to tell the truth. Investigating who shot the deer reveals a long history of game violations.

programme.title: Wardens: Head Case
programme.desc: Someone shot and stashed the head of a trophy bull elk. Wardens spend months staking out the head. Once it is moved they use high tech equipment to locate the head and capture the suspect.

programme.title: Wardens: Blood Trail
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI this week in determining where a deer was killed. But when uncovering the truth the best thing is to follow the Blood Trail.

programme.title: Wardens: Case Closed
programme.desc: The illegal killing of multiple animals over the past 5 years by a family of poachers is going to trial. Wardens on on the witness stand hoping for a guilty verdict and a Case Closed.

programme.title: Wardens: Law Dodgers
programme.desc: Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie chases down hunters that dodged a game check station. A nearly four hour investigation reveals exactly what they were hiding.

programme.title: Wardens: Crying Shame
programme.desc: Region 5 Warden Nick Taylor is in the crosshairs when a hunter points a gun directly at him. And in Region 2 Wardens find a huntress with a secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Wardens: Illegal Possession
programme.desc: Region 3 Wardens chase down a check station runner only to find the hunters have shot a deer – but what and where is the question?

programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Behind Bars The Worlds Toughest Prisons: Tent City Jail, Phoenix, Arizona, USA
programme.desc: Old army tents left over from the Korean War house prisoners instead of cells. The Sheriff is a hard man who refuses to spend any more than he has to on his prisoners. Harassment and humiliation is a part of everyday life at Tent City.
programme.sub-title: Tent City Jail, Phoenix, Arizona, USA

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Renowned editor Maxwell Perkins (Colin Firth) develops a friendship with author Thomas Wolfe (Jude Law) while working on the writer's manuscripts.

programme.title: The Pilot's Wife
programme.desc: A woman (Christine Lahti) discovers her husband (John Heard) was leading a double life after he dies in a plane explosion near Ireland.

programme.title: Ricochet
programme.desc: While investigating a corrupt judge (Gary Cole), a detective (John Corbett) becomes romantically involved with the man's wife (Julie Benz).

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Renowned editor Maxwell Perkins (Colin Firth) develops a friendship with author Thomas Wolfe (Jude Law) while working on the writer's manuscripts.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on a memoir, four children struggle to grow up in a rambling, poverty-stricken, wildly unconventional environment overseen by their dysfunctional yet uniquely loving parents.

programme.title: Ricochet
programme.desc: While investigating a corrupt judge (Gary Cole), a detective (John Corbett) becomes romantically involved with the man's wife (Julie Benz).

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Renowned editor Maxwell Perkins (Colin Firth) develops a friendship with author Thomas Wolfe (Jude Law) while working on the writer's manuscripts.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A young man (Taylor Lautner) must run for his life soon after learning that the folks who raised him are not his real parents.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Hoping to stop a diabolical plot, the CIA implants the memories and skills of a dead agent (Ryan Reynolds) into the mind of a dangerous convict (Kevin Costner).

programme.title: Sanctuary: Icebreaker
programme.desc: Henry and Declan lead a team to rescue a crew of a Russian icebreaker and the abnormal passengers

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: In the exciting season opener, the surviving members of Mutant X emerge from a deadly explosion to meet Lexa, who makes them begin to question fundamental assumptions about their world.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team must stop the auction of a highly lethal substance that a number of notorious international terrorists are vying to acquire.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team is brought in to help a military base that has become infected with a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team must stop a serial killer who leaves clues to his next victims in the form of puzzles.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: When Lexa is unknowingly drugged with a lethal substance, the team must race to find the antidote before it's too late.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team is called in to investigate bizarre activities occurring at a local hospital.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Liam Kincaid races against the clock to find Zo'or, who disappears after contracting an ancient Taelon virus that has the potential to cause a devastating plague.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: Zo'or kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the man's body as a 'vessel' in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to 'test' the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Time Bomb
programme.desc: While examining Ma'el's ship, Liam and Renee find a chamber and in it are some life pods and the persons are all dead except for one.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Fields
programme.desc: Liam investigates a mission run by the Church of the Companions when a friend of his disappears. Sandoval and the Taelons are concerned about "the fields" where something vital to the Taelons' survival is harvested.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Apparition
programme.desc: Liam investigates the suspicious death of a banker, which he saw in a dream. It seems to be an exiled Taelon spirit that is contacting him. Da'an berates Zo'or for his money and power hungry attitude.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: One Taelon Avenue
programme.desc: Joshua Doors is running his own technology development company and Renee goes undercover to find out what is going on. An artificial intelligence program of the Taelons that controls human minds seems to be acting on its own.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Abduction
programme.desc: A volunteer who was working to interpret an ancient message from Ma'el assaults Da'an and escapes through a portal. Sandoval helps Da'an avoid interrogation from Zo'or while they try to locate her.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Arrival
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica. There are Jiridians aboard, but two of the passengers escape. When Augur discovers Lili's blood on the ship, he is convinced that she is not dead.

programme.title: The Lost World: A Man of Vision
programme.desc: The five adventurers all experience visions of Summerlee, the companion they had presumed dead after he disappeared into a waterfall. They suffer injury and face danger as they pursue the vision.

programme.title: The Lost World: Into the Fire
programme.desc: The incredible occurs when a Navy airship flies over the plateau. Malone manages to climb aboard, but is ambushed once inside and meets the deceptive Captain Askwith.

programme.title: The Lost World: Out of the Blue
programme.desc: Marguerite, Roxton, and Challenger take the place of Askwith aboard his ghost ship and return to the day of its fatal departure in 1915. Back on the Plateau, Veronica chases down Askwith.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Travelers
programme.desc: Malone remains missing, and the explorers' search party crosses paths with a trio of travelers. Marguerite becomes taken with the dashing leader, especially when he offers her a way off the Plateau.

programme.title: The Lost World: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: Roxton learns what it's like to be the hunted after he kills a Triceratops. Osina-a mystical, half-dinosaur guardian-puts a curse on him that makes him the target of a mysterious hunter.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Authentic Photographs of an Alien: The Caponi Case
programme.desc: Caponi's encounters with aliens from 1993. Real photos showcase extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Texas UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Scared to Death, Texas UFO, Butch Cassidy and Sibling Search & Update.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.title: Aliens on the Moon: The Truth Exposed
programme.desc: Aliens On The Moon, a compelling 90-minute documentary special, goes beyond the “official” story to examine what really might have happened on the historic day that mankind first set foot on the Moon in 1969.

programme.title: Roswell: The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Major Jesse Marcel investigates strange debris found in 1947, despite being told it's a weather balloon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Dulce Base: The New Illuminati
programme.desc: Dulce, New Mexico is a hotspot for mysterious phenomena and alleged secret military collaboration between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens : Origin of Humanity
programme.desc: Increasing evidence and sightings of UFOs suggest contact with extraterrestrial beings who may have influenced the origins of human life.

programme.title: Cover Ups Conspiracy: The Chinese Spy Balloon
programme.desc: Objects shot down in US/Canada airspace. Pentagon feigns ignorance. Alien involvement?

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay tackles Mark's Greek tragedy, while Alice helps Lois to celebrate her penguin persona.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Scott's terrible tattoo takes his love for Norwich City FC too far. Jay has space-loving Dan's back with an out-of-this-world cover. Sketch tackles a cover to help transgender Jai feel more feminine.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lisa pays tribute to her idol Robbie Williams, while Jack covers his literal leg tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Glen tackles Hannah's four-letter faux pas, and Jay gives firefighter Simon a hot design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jay covers Jack's offensive nickname tatt, while Sketch sweeps away Mark's cobwebs.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Belieber Nathan decides it's time for Sketch to rid him of his embarassing fan tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: House fire survivor Steve has his scarring covered with a Celtic knot design, Amy swaps an embarrassing marriage proposal for a tribute to her favourite dinosaur, and Sam's X-rated nickname is hidden.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jay covers paramedic Anthony's tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice disguises Sonny's unwanted present from his mates. Sketch tackles Alex's drunken DIY teddy bear design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch is monkeying around with Jenny, Joe's Gary Lineker tat gets the red card and Alice fixes Sannahs unfortunate inking error.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sketch and Jay double team Luke's bum art, Alice eases Katie's period pain, Glen puts a snowman on ice while Sketch tattoos a butcher who minced his arm off.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team tackle Sam's embarrassing tattoo, which has earned him a serious ultimatum, deal with holiday ink that Ryan doesn't remember getting, and rid Adam of a lasting reminder of his ex.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Alice rids Sammie of an unladylike error, and Sketch erases Lloyd's misunderstood etching.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice cooks up a treat for ex-chef Melody. Jay helps Az make a wise choice about his past.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Catie Munnings tests the BAC Mono R at Goodwood Circuit, Duncan Pittaway explores the classic Bugatti Type 35, and engineer Dan Dickrell heads off to Florida to witness swamp racing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S is put under the spotlight. Car customiser Elo is in Florida tracking down the Sebring Vanguard Citicar.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: In a re-run of the first ever British Grand prix, a rare pre-war race car, the Halford Special, is lined up to compete against a well-preserved Bugatti.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the unique and venerable racing car the Napier-Railton, built in the 1930s. Plus, a race winning Harrier jump-jet, and its pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A trip to the Bentley Bentayga headquarters in Crewe reveals just how a luxury SUV is designed, built and delivered to the customer. Titch Cormack is in Cornwall uncovering a game-changing early SUV.

programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the unique and venerable racing car the Napier-Railton, built in the 1930s. Plus, a race winning Harrier jump-jet, and its pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Catie Munnings tests the BAC Mono R at Goodwood Circuit, Duncan Pittaway explores the classic Bugatti Type 35, and engineer Dan Dickrell heads off to Florida to witness swamp racing.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie talks to experts on the Three Secrets of Fatima, a series of prophecies allegedly given by the Virgin Mary.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks into the contentious theory that Jesus was married with children and his bloodline lives on today.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Did giants once inhabit the Earth? Jamie Theakston travels to Sardinia to investigate reports of enormous skeletons being found in a network of caves.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie investigates the High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem and how they hid sacred items from the Romans. He also looks at whether the Dead Sea Scrolls reveal the location of hidden wonders.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The magic and mystery of alchemy is revealed as Jamie Theakston meets a `potion maker' and hears about London's alchemic roots from author Joy Hancox.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews attend a HGV driver suffering dizzy spells and a woman who has fallen into a bush. They also move a man with a spinal injury who has no sensation from the neck down.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Hard-working ambulance crews help a young woman who fell down a flight of stairs and a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old who's had a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: On shift with West Midlands Ambulance Service who treat a young lad with a fever, a golf-loving pensioner with a heart problem and a woman convinced she has lung cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver.

programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The riders head to New Zealand to tackle a track that's more daunting than facing down a haka.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race

programme.desc: Sixty teams take on a very quick course down Windhaven Parkway in Fort Worth.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 12
programme.desc: This week’s adventurers call themselves Team Loveit.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 15
programme.desc: The Ali Family are arguably the strongest team on paper ever to face the maze. Will they score a perfect ten in the zones?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 9
programme.desc: This week the Hauxwell tackle the maze with remarkable results. How bad can it get in the maze? You’re about to find out…

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's team, Let's Get Medical, are a group of medical students. Your lives may soon be in their hands. You may have concerns after witnessing this lot attempt to tackle the mighty maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with a new series of everyday adventurers hoping to make it to the Crystal Dome, starting with The Gamers.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tonight's team are called The Vikings because they spend most of their spare time living like Vikings. As they travel through the zones they'll be answering the question, 'can you ever have too much testosterone in a room'?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's takes self-belief, attitude and quick wits to conquer the maze. Tonight's team, The London Girls, are over-flowing with two of the three. Will Maze Master Richard Ayoade ever be able to keep control of this calamitous and kamikaze bunch?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: In tonight’s show Team Well Read and Underfed, a group of plucky students, attempt to take on the maze. Will they graduate with honours?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 8
programme.desc: This week’s team of Welsh hopefuls met working at Pizza Hut. How will they cope with the maze when some of their team appear to have no concept of urgency?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 7
programme.desc: An all-female footballing team hope to score in the maze tonight. Will they play defensively or go on the attack?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Air Cadets bring a bravado bonanza to the maze this week. They begin the night predicting big things, but will they deliver?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 14
programme.desc: This week it’s the turn of a team of midwives to face the maze. These five feisty females prove how important communication is, by demonstrating the consequences of not listening to each other.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week Team features a player who took part in the original series twenty six years ago. She won both her games back then…will her 100% record remain intact?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 13
programme.desc: In tonight’s show we see a team of police officers hoping to lay down the law in the maze…but will they end up locked behind bars?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 10
programme.desc: Tonight’s team met on jury service and are looking to deliver justice in the dome. They may have high hopes, but the maze is a law unto itself.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads The Holmes Family around the maze as they attempt to win precious crystals and not have a major falling out.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight’s show a team called The Cheerleaders, five disproportionately excitable young ladies, hope enthusiasm will help them in their quest through the maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight’s team are huge fans of the original series and have engaged in intensive research on how to tackle the challenges ahead. Sometimes all the preparation in the world can be utterly pointless.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: Tonight's team are The Science Nerds, proving that just because you put the words 'science' and 'nerds' in the name of your team does not necessarily mean anyone should expect competence.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Baptisms and Betrayals
programme.desc: Nat D's boyfriend makes a chilling and unexpected appearance at her home. Meanwhile, Renee decides to take her newfound peace to the next level. Karen receives a letter from her father causing her to work harder towards his early release from prison.

programme.title: Mob Wives starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of Paul Gault was discovered in the bedroom of his house, police began to uncover the facts behind a brutal murder.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: By September 1973, with three murders in just three months, South Wales Police realised they were looking for Wales' first documented serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In February 2012, a man got into a pick-up truck at a mall close to his home and was never seen alive again. Nine months later, after a huge search was launched, police discovered his human remains.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.
